checks.detail: Hands-on Python exercise with clear run steps
Setup and answer code are fenced
answer opens with markdown heading '# Solution'
Answer is full script from setup plus changes
Setup has no comments marking features the tasks require
No Prerequisites section; Python assumed silently

violations.fix: Replace headings with plain prose labels; keep code in fences only
Add comments in the setup that mark LeaderStore / linearizable_read as the required features
Add Prerequisites: Python 3.10+ (stdlib only); no extra packages

feedbackForEditor: 1) Strip '# Solution' / '## Write-up' from answer; use plain prose. 2) Comment the setup where LeaderStore and linearizable_read belong. 3) Add an explicit Prerequisites line with install/runtime guidance.
